Same as ticket [c36cdb4afd504dc1].
key_bug_features: Segfault on SQL input with invalid arithmetic operation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value TEXT, amount REAL CHECK(amount >= 0));
CREATE TABLE test2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES test1(id));
SELECT * FROM test1 WHERE amount + (SELECT NULL) IS NULL;
